default_rule: No innovation profile is default Excel compatibility. Every entry requires explicit opt-in and replay/formal evidence before use.

entries.target_problem: Intentional monotone model equations currently encoded as accidental circular references.
entries.semantic_contract: Declared finite lattice/domain, monotone transfer functions, least fixed-point target.
entries.termination_or_rejection_policy: Iterate to least fixed point or reject if monotonicity/domain proof is absent.

entries.target_problem: Stateful recurrence modeled without accidental same-wave SCCs.
entries.semantic_contract: Typed previous-state edge separates recurrence time from current-wave dependency.
entries.termination_or_rejection_policy: Reject unbounded same-wave SCCs; evaluate recurrence over declared index/time domain.

entries.target_problem: Large or dynamic circular references are hard to debug.
entries.semantic_contract: Expose cycle-region members, internal/boundary edges, CTRO provenance, graph hash, and release history without changing calculation result.
entries.termination_or_rejection_policy: Follows active calculation profile; diagnostics are observational sidecars only.

entries.target_problem: Retained prior values should not masquerade as fresh publication after cycle rejection.
entries.semantic_contract: Prior values remain visible only with explicit retained/stale/cycle-rejected state.
entries.termination_or_rejection_policy: Rejected cycle publishes no new values; downstream freshness requires explicit profile allowance.

entries.target_problem: Bounded iterative cycles need clear convergence, divergence, and oscillation diagnostics.
entries.excel_relation: may_match_values_under selected profile while adding diagnostics
entries.semantic_contract: Profile records every iteration delta and terminal classification.
entries.termination_or_rejection_policy: Publish only converged complete region; reject max-iteration, divergence, oscillation, and nonnumeric terminals.

entries.target_problem: Dynamic cycle release should avoid unnecessary full rebuild when local repair is equivalent.
entries.semantic_contract: Use reverse edges and overlay deltas to invalidate exactly affected members and dependents, then prove/check equivalence to full rebuild.
entries.termination_or_rejection_policy: If local repair proof/check fails, fall back to full rebuild or reject publication.
